sections.paragraph:
verb לחטוב

to cut, chop, fell (wood)

verb להיחטב

be cut, chopped, felled (wood)

verb לחטב

to carve, sculpture; make a curved body

verb חוטב (>>חֻטַּב)

be carved, sculptured; to get a curved body

verb להתחטב

be well carved; to get a well curved body

verb לחטב (>>חיטב)

to carve, sculpture; make a curved body
